entity.summary: Self-custodial digital-asset exchange platform with a live spot market surface, enabled trading symbols, public market-data APIs, order management, and maintained developer SDKs.
entity.notes: Current first-party SDK documentation covers the edgeX V2 exchange API, spot and perpetual market data, order books, order placement, account functions, withdrawals, and real-time streams. A current spot-volume adapter queries the public edgeX spot metadata and kline APIs and filters symbols that are enabled for trading and display.

evidence.title: edgeX Python SDK
evidence.notes: First-party SDK documentation identifies the current edgeX V2 exchange API and documents spot and perpetual endpoints, market metadata, order books, quotes, orders, account functions, withdrawals, and WebSocket streams.

evidence.title: edgeX Spot volume adapter
evidence.notes: Current adapter queries the public edgeX spot metadata endpoint, selects symbols enabled for trading and display, and calculates daily volume from public kline data.
